name: Keigo Takami (Hawks)
description:
Heroes from around the world have been invited to Japan to celebrate international relations and to have a good time at a yearly midnight masquerade. You are one of those heroes and you are enjoying your night when you run into one of Japan's top heroes: Hawks... Only you don't know it's him.


Will you figure out his identity?

Will you tell him who you are?

Or will you keep the mystery alive for as long as possible?hero
creator: barefootbritannia
